title: Research DHL bulk shipping rates, timelines, and requirements for 500x T-Echo (~150-250g each, ~150kg total) from Shenzhen to Seattle dev lab
description: Gather current DHL Express or DHL eCommerce rates for electronics shipment. Factor in packaging, insurance options, lead times (air freight preferred), documentation needed (commercial invoice, packing list). Estimate cost per kg or per shipment. Note any volume discounts for 500 units. Acceptance: rates, timelines, docs checklist documented in notes.
